title: koeleria britannica
intro: Koeleria britannica, also known as June grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and supporting respiratory health. Koeleria britannica is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused in hot water to make a medicinal drink, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
